overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing protagonist Aloy running through a forested mountain trail during golden hour. The character navigates a winding dirt path surrounded by dense vegetation, encounters a wild boar, and moves through varying terrain including rocky outcrops and groves of dead white trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with red wildflower patches

events.description: character's focus headgear device activates with glowing purple light

agents.ego_description: Aloy is running steadily along the forest dirt path with bow equipped on her back, heading toward the distant mountain

entered.detail: tall evergreen pine trees lining both sides of the forest path
dense patches of vibrant red wildflowers growing on the left side of the trail
large rocky mountain peak visible through the trees in the distance
winding dirt trail with patches of grass and small rocks

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a forest trail during golden hour, with tall pine trees framing the path and dense red wildflowers lining the left side. Aloy runs forward along the dirt path toward a distant mountain peak, and as the segment ends, her focus headgear activates with a purple glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with green grass undergrowth

events.description: wild boar runs across the path from right to left ahead of the character

agents.ego_description: continuing to run along the trail with focus device now active and glowing purple, scanning the path ahead

notable_agents.action: wild boar running across the dirt path from right to left, disappearing into the undergrowth

entered.detail: large gray rock formation beside the path surrounded by green grass
lush green grass growing in dense patches along the trail edges

segments.scene_description: Aloy continues running through a greener section of forest where red flowers give way to lush grass patches. A wild boar suddenly crosses the path from right to left ahead of her. Large boulders begin to appear beside the trail as the mountain peak shifts to the center of the view.

events.description: sun comes into direct view through the trees creating strong lens flare and bright backlighting
terrain becomes more rocky with large boulders and steep mountain slopes visible

agents.ego_description: running toward the setting sun as it creates a bright lens flare through the pine trees, navigating around rocky outcrops

entered.detail: steep rocky mountain face with sparse vegetation and jagged peaks
prominent moss-covered boulder formation beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character runs directly toward the setting sun, which creates a dramatic lens flare through the trees. The environment transitions to rockier terrain with steep mountain slopes on the left and large boulders lining the path. The vegetation becomes sparser as the trail winds through the rugged landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with dead white trees and rocky terrain

events.description: entering area with prominent dead white trees on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding mountain path past dead white trees and scattered rocky outcrops, maintaining a steady pace

entered.detail: leafless white-barked dead trees standing in a cluster beside the trail
scattered rocks and rough uneven ground along the left edge of the path

segments.scene_description: The final segment features a more rugged section of trail characterized by distinctive dead white trees on the right and rocky terrain on the left. The sky becomes partially obscured by denser tree cover, creating more diffused lighting. Aloy continues running along the winding dirt path as the environment shows signs of changing seasons or environmental conditions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain trail that transforms from a lush, flower-lined forest into a rugged, rocky landscape under the glow of a setting sun. It begins with Aloy running past tall pine trees and dense red wildflowers toward a distant peak, just as her focus headgear activates with a purple glow. As she continues forward, the red flowers give way to lush grass and large boulders, while a wild boar suddenly darts across the path. The scene then shifts as she runs directly toward the sun, creating a dramatic lens flare that accompanies a transition into sparser vegetation and steep mountain slopes. Finally, the trail winds through a more rugged environment characterized by distinctive dead white trees and diffused lighting under a denser canopy.
